name: ai2thor-navigator
summary: Base AI2-THOR navigation behavior for agents connected to the roboclaws MCP server.

mcp.boundary_notes: The base skill uses the canonical navigation surface only. Task-like photo behavior and privileged demo helper usage live in capture-object-photo.

refactor_signals: task-specific instructions accumulate in this base navigation skill
multiple task skills need a lower-level navigation service
promote_to_mcp_when: a behavior is needed by multiple skills
the capability boundary is stable and profile-specific
trace and reports can preserve substeps
